name: GitHub Copilot
description_en: Use a GitHub Copilot subscription for title parsing via the device-flow login.
description_zh: 通过 device flow 登录，用 GitHub Copilot 订阅解析标题。
risk_notice_en: Copilot's internal endpoint is for official clients only; third-party use may violate GitHub's terms and trigger abuse detection. Use at your own risk.
risk_notice_zh: Copilot 内部端点仅供官方客户端使用，第三方调用可能违反 GitHub 条款并触发滥用检测。请自担风险。
